segments.text: Make the tabernacle with ten curtains of fine twined linen, and blue, and purple, and scarlet: with cherubims of cunning work shalt thou make them.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: of cunning work: Heb. the work of a cunning workman, or, embroiderer

segments.text: The length of one curtain shall be eight and twenty cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: and every one of the curtains shall have one measure.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The five curtains shall be coupled together one to another; and other five curtains shall be coupled one to another.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make loops of blue upon the edge of the one curtain from the selvedge in the coupling; and likewise shalt thou make in the uttermost edge of another curtain, in the coupling of the second.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: selvedge: an edge of cloth so woven that it cannot unravel

segments.text: Fifty loops shalt thou make in the one curtain, and fifty loops shalt thou make in the edge of the curtain that is in the coupling of the second; that the loops may take hold one of another.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make fifty taches of gold, and couple the curtains together with the taches: and it shall be one tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make curtains of goats' hair to be a covering upon the tabernacle: eleven curtains shalt thou make.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The length of one curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of one curtain four cubits: and the eleven curtains shall be all of one measure.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Couple five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves, and shalt double the sixth curtain in the forefront of the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make fifty loops on the edge of the one curtain that is outmost in the coupling, and fifty loops in the edge of the curtain which coupleth the second.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make fifty taches of brass, and put the taches into the loops, and couple the tent together, that it may be one.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The remnant that remaineth of the curtains of the tent, the half curtain that remaineth, shall hang over the backside of the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: A cubit on the one side, and a cubit on the other side of that which remaineth in the length of the curtains of the tent, it shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle on this side and on that side, to cover it.
segments.speaker: God

footnotes: of that which remaineth: Heb. in the remainder, or, surplus

segments.text: Make a covering for the tent of rams' skins dyed red, and a covering above of badgers' skins.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make boards for the tabernacle of shittim wood standing up.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ten cubits shall be the length of a board, and a cubit and a half shall be the breadth of one board.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Two tenons shall there be in one board, set in order one against another: thus shalt thou make for all the boards of the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make the boards for the tabernacle, twenty boards on the south side southward.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make forty sockets of silver under the twenty boards; two sockets under one board for his two tenons, and two sockets under another board for his two tenons.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the second side of the tabernacle on the north side there shall be twenty boards:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their forty sockets of silver; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the sides of the tabernacle westward thou shalt make six boards.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Two boards shalt thou make for the corners of the tabernacle in the two sides.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall be coupled together beneath, and they shall be coupled together above the head of it unto one ring: thus shall it be for them both; they shall be for the two corners.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They shall be eight boards, and their sockets of silver, sixteen sockets; two sockets under one board, and two sockets under another board.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make bars of shittim wood; five for the boards of the one side of the tabernacle,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Five bars for the boards of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the boards of the side of the tabernacle, for the two sides westward.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The middle bar in the midst of the boards shall reach from end to end.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Overlay the boards with gold, and make their rings of gold for places for the bars: and thou shalt overlay the bars with gold.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Rear up the tabernacle according to the fashion thereof which was shewed thee in the mount.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make a vail of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen of cunning work: with cherubims shall it be made:
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hang it upon four pillars of shittim wood overlaid with gold: their hooks shall be of gold, upon the four sockets of silver.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hang up the vail under the taches, that thou mayest bring in thither within the vail the ark of the testimony: and the vail shall divide unto you between the holy place and the most holy.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put the mercy seat upon the ark of the testimony in the most holy place.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Set the table without the vail, and the candlestick over against the table on the side of the tabernacle toward the south: and thou shalt put the table on the north side.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make an hanging for the door of the tent, of blue, and purple, and scarlet, and fine twined linen, wrought with needlework.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make for the hanging five pillars of shittim wood, and overlay them with gold, and their hooks shall be of gold: and thou shalt cast five sockets of brass for them.
segments.speaker: God
